full_text:
Xiu Ze 脩則
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xiu Ze (脩則). Died in battle against Mao Jiong in Jiaozhi. Xiu Ze was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Xiu Ze lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
